title: State-dependence boundary map

nature_skill.name: nature-figure
nature_skill.contract: quantitative grid; SVG/PDF/PNG; editable SVG/PDF text; source CSV traceability

core_conclusion: No interpretable exploratory state-dependence row reached q<=0.10, so state dependence does not rescue the primary result.
target_output: offline reader report and publication-editable static figure exports

panel_map.a: Strongest favorable and reverse exploratory rows.
panel_map.b: Minimum FDR q against the reporting threshold.

evidence_hierarchy.hero_evidence: Strongest favorable and reverse exploratory rows.
evidence_hierarchy.controls_or_boundary: Local strata are exploratory and cannot be presented as robustness or mechanism proof.

statistics_notes: Panel a shows Spearman rho with bootstrap 95% CIs; panel b compares minimum FDR q with the q<=0.10 threshold.
image_integrity_notes: No raster scientific image manipulation; all charts are generated from corrected tabular sources.
reviewer_risk: Local strata are exploratory and cannot be presented as robustness or mechanism proof.
